definition: External or internal stress moving the system toward a threshold
measurement_note: Nutrient load heat demand debt disturbance frequency legitimacy pressure or extraction

definition: Degree to which change is self-reinforcing
measurement_note: Erosion-regrowth trust-performance ice-albedo liquidity panic or cascade feedbacks

definition: Shock or repeated disturbance acting on system state
measurement_note: Storm fire disease outage economic shock institutional crisis or drought

definition: Ability to adjust learn reorganize and preserve function
measurement_note: Redundancy diversity slack monitoring governance flexibility trust and resources

definition: Ecological institutional cultural or technical memory supporting recovery
measurement_note: Seed banks records experienced personnel design knowledge local knowledge or refugia

definition: Rate at which the system returns after disturbance
measurement_note: Service restoration regrowth trust rebuilding repair or recovery from shocks

definition: Rolling variability of system state before transition
measurement_note: Can rise as stabilizing forces weaken in some systems

definition: Lag-1 persistence in system state before transition
measurement_note: Can rise under critical slowing down
